mapper.select: SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND TITLE = #{title}

SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND LCLSSYSTM3 = #{lclssystm3}
SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC
SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} ORDER BY TITLE ASC

SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND ADDR1 LIKE #{addrPattern}
SELECT #{value} AS placeId, TITLE, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY FROM place WHERE PLACE_ID = #{value}
SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY FROM place
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visit_item (VISIT_ITEM_ID, VISIT_ORDER, DISTANCE_TO_NEXT, PLACE_ID, SCHEDULE_ID, SCHEDULE_TYPE) VALUES ((SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(visit_item_id_temp AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 FROM (SELECT VISIT_ITEM_ID AS visit_item_id_temp FROM visit_item) AS temp), #{visitOrder}, #{distanceToNext}, #{placeId}, #{scheduleId}, #{scheduleType})
mapper.select: SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, PLACE_TYPE AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = 'LEISURE' ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC
SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, PLACE_TYPE AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = 'LEISURE'
SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY FROM place WHERE PLACE_ID = #{value}
SELECT VISIT_ORDER, IFNULL(DISTANCE_TO_NEXT, 0) AS DISTANCE_TO_NEXT, PLACE_ID FROM visit_item WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{value} ORDER BY VISIT_ORDER ASC
SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY FROM place WHERE PLACE_ID = #{value}
SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} ORDER BY TITLE ASC
SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC

SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND LCLSSYSTM3 = #{category} ORDER BY TITLE ASC

SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND LCLSSYSTM3 = #{category} ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC

SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND (TITLE LIKE #{keywordPattern} OR ADDR1 LIKE #{keywordPattern}) ORDER BY TITLE ASC

SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND (TITLE LIKE #{keywordPattern} OR ADDR1 LIKE #{keywordPattern}) ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC

SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND LCLSSYSTM3 = #{category} AND (TITLE LIKE #{keywordPattern} OR ADDR1 LIKE #{keywordPattern}) ORDER BY TITLE ASC

SELECT PLACE_ID AS placeId, TITLE, FIRST_IMAGE AS firstImage, ADDR1, MAPX, MAPY, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, #{placeType} AS placeType FROM place WHERE PLACE_TYPE = #{placeType} AND LCLSSYSTM3 = #{category} AND (TITLE LIKE #{keywordPattern} OR ADDR1 LIKE #{keywordPattern}) ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC
